hero.name: B.Jang
hero.title: Technical Product Manager
hero.subtitle:
I define product direction, design scalable platforms,
and integrate AI as a structural decision layer.
hero.mission: Architecting high-impact platforms and systemic strategies targeted for global enterprise ecosystems.

identity.title: Identity & Product Philosophy
identity.text1: My academic roots in Philosophy fundamentally trained me in structural reasoning—equipping me to identify core systemic flaws rather than chasing surface-level features. I advocate for profound product direction, firmly believing that robust logical scaffolding dictates a product's market resonance and long-term viability.
identity.text2: I operate with an uncompromising platform scalability mindset. Moving far beyond localized functionalities, I prioritize decision traceability, ecosystem expansion, and rigorous risk-aware design. My central objective is to build unshakeable, predictable product architectures that unconditionally safeguard organizational accountability.
identity.text3:
"I treat AI as a structural redesign of decision systems, not as a feature."
Leveraging profound technical acumen, I maintain seamless cross-functional alignment with engineering divisions. This ensures our strategic vision is translated flawlessly into concrete logic without falling victim to hype-driven engineering, positioning AI as a highly deliberate decision-support layer.

loggy.title: Loggy: Resolving the Volatility of Decision Architectures
loggy.subtitle: A Git-inspired synchronous/asynchronous collaborative platform.
loggy.problem: Market Structural Flaw: Current collaboration tools inherently lack decision traceability. Critical organizational consensus and Engineering Decision Records (EDRs) fade immediately into unstructured, ephemeral chat streams, crippling long-term accountability.
loggy.insight: Product Direction Insight: I conceptualized a Git-inspired operational model. By treating specific meeting agendas as independent 'branches' and finalized decisions as 'commits,' we radically redefined the collaborative structure into a permanent decision-record platform.
loggy.architecture: Platform Design Decision: Engineered strict state isolation, definitively decoupling ephemeral interactions (WebSockets) from the persistent organizational decision logic (REST). This guaranteed absolute data integrity while paving the way for massive concurrent scaling.
loggy.learning: Engineering Alignment & Execution: Directed cross-functional stakeholders through complex negotiations. Eschewed frontend trivialities to focus obsessively on state transition logic, proving that genuine platform leadership lies in orchestrating scalable system dependencies.

platform.title: Product Direction & Platform > Feature
platform.desc: I aggressively reject disjointed feature-factory mentalities. I steer overarching product direction by modeling ecosystem-level state transitions, evaluating market structural dynamics, and architecting cohesive platforms engineered for infinite scalability.

alignment.title: Ecosystem Scalability & Alignment
alignment.desc: Anchored in a relentless long-term roadmap mindset and profound revenue structure thinking, I consistently translate deeply complex business imperatives into undeniable engineering specifications, driving stakeholder alignment and seeding powerful network effects.

depth.title: Technical Depth as Leverage
depth.subtitle: Structural engineering literacy operates not to boast implementation, but to wield profound leverage in systemic risk reduction.

state.title: State Transition Modeling
state.desc: Mastery over abstracting complex data integrity logic across client-server boundaries, vastly mitigating miscommunication latency and neutralizing technical debt before the very first line of code is written.

realtime.title: System-level Risk Reduction
realtime.desc: Fluent technical communication fortified by an intrinsic understanding of concurrent, real-time architectures, enabling the aggressive preemption of operational bottlenecks during the foundational architectural design phase.

ai.title: AI Strategy & Deployment
ai.subtitle: AI is not a trendy appendage—it is a foundational structural integration. I deploy human-in-the-loop architectures that forcefully mitigate algorithmic overreliance.

responsibility.title: Decision-Support & Responsibility Pivot
responsibility.desc: I position AI strictly as a hyper-accountable decision-support layer. By systematically instituting explainability-aware paradigms and rigid human-in-the-loop structures, I shift responsibility boundaries safely and ethically within enterprise ecosystems.

integration.title: Risk Containment Architecture
integration.desc: Orchestrating comprehensive structural transformations that definitively isolate generative variance. I focus entirely on strategic architecture, ensuring AI capabilities are fully decoupled to contain unpredictable behavioral risks within enterprise-grade bounds.

1.name: Define Structural Problem
1.desc: Interrogate surface-level symptoms to aggressively define the absolute structural market bottleneck.

2.name: Analyze System-Level Risk
2.desc: Evaluate technical dependencies and map unmitigated downstream systemic risks without illusion.

3.name: Design Scalable Model
3.desc: Pre-engineer scalable, platform-level business logic specifically crafted to absorb long-term, exponential ecosystem expansion.

4.name: Validate with Minimal Structure
4.desc: Ruthlessly isolate the most critical proof-of-concept required to secure pristine validation points against constrained organizational resources.

5.name: Expand with Platform Lens
5.desc: Accelerate growth pipelines by projecting validated structural logic confidently into adjacent revenue-generating domains.

ssafy.title: Cross-Functional Collaboration & Platform Thinking
ssafy.desc1: Synthesized rigid algorithmic logic with advanced product thinking throughout an intensive, full-time structural incubator environment.
ssafy.desc2: Exercised product leadership across multiple high-velocity agile sprints, continuously driving engineering alignment and architecting platforms with unyielding scalability.
ssafy.desc3: Recognized with the Excellence Project Award for demonstrating executive-level product direction and profound structural modeling potential.

marines.title: Decision Clarity Under Extreme Pressure
marines.desc1: Internalized ironclad discipline and overarching accountability within severely constrained, zero-margin-for-error operational environments.
marines.desc2: Mastered the absolute necessity of hyper-structured chain-of-command protocols and instantaneous decision clarity during unpredictable crises.

jaguar.title: Customer Experience System Operation
jaguar.desc1: Directed comprehensive VIP customer experience pipelines, forcefully maintaining a persistent, high-altitude system view over real-time operational flows.
jaguar.desc2: Continuously interrogated and restructured field movement systems to immediately eradicate bottlenecks and maximize operational throughput.

restaurant.title: Business Model & Revenue Structure Thinking
restaurant.desc1: Shouldered absolute ownership of end-to-end business models, ingraining a deep-seated responsibility for foundational revenue structures from inception.
restaurant.desc2: Exhibited aggressive operational scalability by optimizing physical demand pipelines in direct response to highly volatile market traffic assumptions.
